strengths: Exceeds the 15-year minimum experience requirement with over 18 years spanning software, hardware (robotic arms), and cloud infrastructure (Kubernetes, AWS CDK).
Possesses direct, hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure, developer tooling, and MCP (Model Context Protocol) frameworks, aligning perfectly with the AI builder fluency requirement.
Demonstrates strong entrepreneurial drive as a founder (GISCollective) and a proven ability to inspire others through numerous technical talks, workshops, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks the preferred Master's degree or PhD in an AI-related field, holding a Bachelor's in Computer Science instead.
While possessing recent AI-agent experience, the majority of his career has been focused on general software craftsmanship and GIS platforms rather than deep, specialized Machine Learning.
Transitioning to a Director-level Principal role represents a step up in organizational scope from his previous Staff and Senior Individual Contributor positions.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly compelling candidate for this Director-level Principal Engineer role because he brings over 18 years of comprehensive software, hardware, and infrastructure experience, comfortably surpassing the 15-year minimum requirement. His recent, hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators directly satisfies the need for cloud and AI builder fluency. Furthermore, his proven entrepreneurial drive as a platform founder and his extensive track record of delivering technical talks and workshops perfectly position him to inspire engineering teams, advise strategic partners, and lead AI-driven product innovation.
